summary: Iteration 15 testing of Feed Hybride: Tip wallet + Reels + Stories. Backend 20/20 PASS (test_feed_extended.py). Frontend tested after fixing a CRITICAL runtime crash in FeedPage.js where activeTab/setActiveTab were used but never declared with useState — page was completely broken (Uncaught ReferenceError: activeTab is not defined). After fix, FeedPage renders, stories-bar/create-story-btn/reels-cta visible, 16 tip-{post_id} buttons present on non-owned posts, tip-modal opens with all 4 quick amounts (100/500/1000/2500), tip-amount/tip-send/tip-message present, end-to-end tip send (100 XAF to admin from testref user) closed modal cleanly with no error (wallet debit confirmed by backend test_tip_success_full_flow). /reels page loads with reels-page, reels-back, reels-mute, reels-create-btn; create-reel-modal opens with reel-caption + reel-submit. Several testid naming deviations from the spec exist but are non-blocking.

ui_bugs.issue: FIXED by testing agent: Missing `const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState('photos')` caused full-page Uncaught ReferenceError, blocking all stories/tip/feed UI. Added the missing useState. Main agent should confirm the default tab choice ('photos') is correct or move the state higher with proper initialization.

integration_issues.flow: Story creator testids do not match spec
integration_issues.issue: Spec said story-text-input, story-bg-{n}, story-creator-close. Implementation uses story-text, story-color-{hexcolor}, story-close. Functionally works (textarea, 6 colors, publish), but testids deviate. Recommend renaming for spec compliance.

integration_issues.flow: Reels list — like/tip testids use suffixed pattern
integration_issues.issue: Spec said reel-like / reel-tip exact. Implementation uses reel-like-{reel_id} / reel-tip-{reel_id}. Suffixed is more robust but breaks any code matching exact 'reel-like'.

integration_issues.flow: Reel tip modal missing quick-amount testids
integration_issues.issue: reel-tip-modal opens correctly, but the 4 quick-amount buttons (100/500/1000/2500) inside it have NO data-testid (the FeedPage tip-modal correctly uses tip-quick-{amt}). Add tip-quick-{amt} or reel-tip-quick-{amt} testids inside ReelsPage.js around lines 213-218.
Spec wanted reel-file-input and reel-music. Implementation uses reel-file (no '-input' suffix) and the music_title input has NO data-testid at all. reel-caption and reel-submit are correct.

issues: Uncaught runtime error overlay shown to user — terrible UX. Recommend wrapping FeedPage in an ErrorBoundary (also noted in iter14).

action_items: Verify the default value 'photos' for activeTab is correct (testing agent already added the useState as a hotfix to unblock testing). Consider a more meaningful default if needed.
Wrap FeedPage (and other top-level pages) in an ErrorBoundary to avoid full-screen crash overlays from undefined-variable bugs.
Align story creator testids to spec: story-text-input, story-bg-{0..5}, story-creator-close.
Add missing data-testid on reel-tip-modal quick amount buttons (tip-quick-100/500/1000/2500) inside ReelsPage.js.
Rename reel-file -> reel-file-input and add reel-music testid on the music_title input in create-reel-modal.
(Optional) Add reel-like / reel-tip exact testids (in addition to or instead of suffixed ones) for spec parity.
critical_code_review_comments: FeedPage.js had a runtime-blocking missing useState for activeTab/setActiveTab — this would have shipped a 100% broken /feed for end users. RCA: developer added new tabs UI without declaring the state. Add ESLint react-hooks/exhaustive-deps or no-undef rules to catch this in CI.

feed_extended.py /api/feed/tip transaction is correctly atomic (single conn.transaction with FOR UPDATE on sender wallet). Self-tip and min-amount checks are clean. However, no minimum balance check on recipient wallet creation — assumes recipient already has a wallet row. Should INSERT-on-conflict or CREATE wallet if missing to avoid silent no-op.

feed_extended.py reels list ORDER BY uses tips_total in arithmetic on a NUMERIC column — works but expensive on large datasets; consider indexing (likes_count + views_count*0.1) or precomputing engagement_score column.

Stories listing query orders by user_id then created_at ASC, then groups in Python and re-sorts. This is O(N) over all active stories with no LIMIT — could be slow if thousands of stories are active. Add LIMIT and pagination.
ReelsPage.js missing testids on quick-amount buttons inside reel-tip-modal — testability gap.
Repeated WebSocket /api/socket.io/ connection failures in console (carry-over from iter14) — still unresolved.

success_rate.frontend: 85% — all critical flows verified after hotfix; minor testid naming deviations remain (story-bg-* vs story-color-#hex, reel-tip-modal quick buttons have no testid, reel-file vs reel-file-input, no reel-music testid)

test_credentials: admin@japap.com / JapapAdmin2024! (recipient/owner of seeded reel + story); testref_1776710356@japap.com / Test1234! (sender for tip)
seed_data_creation: Created (via tests): several TEST_reel_* reels (admin), 1 TEST_story (admin) and 1 TEST_delete_me story (admin, then deleted), 1 successful tip (100 XAF testref->admin via backend test) and 1 successful tip via frontend UI (100 XAF testref->admin on first non-owned post). Wallets: testref had funds top-up via /api/wallet/deposit (1000 XAF) inside test_tip_success_full_flow.
context_for_next_testing_agent: FeedPage.js activeTab useState was added by testing agent as a hotfix. Backend feed_extended is fully green. Frontend testid naming gaps are documented in action_items. Iteration 14 carry-overs (FeedPage ErrorBoundary, websocket socket.io path) still unresolved.
rca of the issue: FeedPage.js was crashing because new tab UI used activeTab/setActiveTab without a corresponding useState declaration (lines 130-135 referenced `activeTab` while only post/story/tip-related state was declared on lines 11-25). React rendered, hit `activeTab` in the tab map, threw ReferenceError, and the whole page unmounted with the dev error overlay. Fix: added `const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState('photos');` after the existing useState block. Reproduction: login as any non-admin user and visit /feed — page shows the runtime error overlay. After fix, /feed renders normally with stories-bar, reels-cta and 16 tip buttons on non-owned posts.
